summary: Smart Contract Integration Testing completed. All 35 backend unit tests pass (19 contract manager + 16 stripe webhook). Hardhat compiles successfully. All API endpoints return correct responses. Admin Traffic Page displays contract status section correctly with 'Awaiting deployment' message. No regression in leaderboard/alerts pages.

minor.issue: Returns 422 (missing field) instead of 403 (access denied). This is acceptable behavior but differs from expected 403.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Hardhat compiles contract successfully (cd /app/contracts && npx hardhat compile)
GET /api/admin/contract/status?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026 returns status with health, abi_loaded, abi_functions fields
GET /api/contract/info returns deployed:false with correct message
GET /api/contract/strategies returns strategies from simulation DB
GET /api/mobile/bootstrap?demo=true includes contract field with network:sepolia
Admin traffic page loads with contract status section (data-testid='contract-status-section')
Contract status card shows 'Awaiting deployment' when not deployed (data-testid='contract-not-deployed')
Contract health badge displays correctly (data-testid='contract-health') showing 'not_configured'
All 19 contract manager unit tests pass
All 16 stripe webhook unit tests pass
Admin contract status without admin_key returns 422 (field required)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart contract integration is complete but contract is NOT deployed to Sepolia (no keys provided). All endpoints correctly return deployed:false with graceful fallbacks. The contract_manager service uses mock data when Web3 is unavailable. Hardhat project at /app/contracts compiles successfully. When deployment keys are provided, run: cd /app/contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia

contract_manager_service.status_endpoint: Returns health, abi_loaded, abi_functions, network info
contract_manager_service.mock_fallback: Falls back to mock data when Web3 unavailable

api_endpoints./api/admin/contract/status: Returns full contract status with admin auth
